title: Welcome to LiverRa
subtitle: Complete these 5 steps to activate your account (approx 15 min).
privacyNote: This wizard collects no patient information. Every step is auditable.

password.title: Set your password
password.subtitle: Choose a strong password (min 12 chars) or link your hospital single sign-on.
password.tooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters.

mfa.title: Set up multi-factor authentication
mfa.subtitle: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, save the backup codes, then enter a code to confirm.

ruo.title: Research Use Only — accept the terms
ruo.body: LiverRa is classified as Research Use Only. Outputs are not a medical device and must not be used as the sole basis for clinical decisions. You remain the responsible clinician. All analyses are logged to an immutable audit trail.
ruo.checkbox: I have read and accept the Research Use Only terms.

tour.title: Quick tour
tour.s1: Drop a DICOM archive here to start a new analysis.
tour.s2: Watch the per-stage status — each checkpoint is audited.
tour.s3: Drag the resection plane to see FLR update live.
tour.s4: Append or refine lesions with the AI assistant.
tour.s5: Finalize when ready — the PDF + DICOM-SEG are saved to PACS.

sample.title: Run a demo case
sample.subtitle: Open a pre-seeded demo analysis to explore the viewer, FLR calculator, and finalize flow. This is synthetic data.
sample.redirecting: Redirecting you to the demo case…

demo.title: Demo case
demo.subtitle: Explore the full pipeline on synthetic data. Re-open any time from the Help menu.
demo.body: The demo case has no real patient data. PACS push is disabled; outputs are watermarked "Sample data".
